'''Cho P'qun''' was the Chief [[Engineer/Legends|Engineer]] of the ''[[Adamantine]]'' when it and its crew were infected with the [[Death Seed]] Plague in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
